briefdescription.para: Lookup a field by ID, including fields from table schema fallbacks.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< Schema > table_schema, std::span< const std::shared_ptr< Schema > > schemas={})
memberdef.name: MakeFieldLookup

briefdescription.para: Build a lookup from the current schema and optional table schemas.

detaileddescription.para: The current table schema is searched first. schemas is the table metadata schema list and may contain table_schema; current schema duplicates are ignored and fallback schemas are searched from latest schema id to oldest.

briefdescription.para: Build a lookup from table metadata which uses the current schema first, then table metadata schemas as fallback.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string file_path, std::span< const std::shared_ptr< DataFile > > delete_files, std::shared_ptr< Schema > table_schema, std::shared_ptr< Schema > requested_schema, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io, bool need_row_pos_col=true, std::shared_ptr< DeleteCounter > counter=nullptr)
memberdef.name: Make

briefdescription.para: Create a DeleteFilter with current schema only field lookup.

parameterdescription.para: If true, _pos is added to RequiredSchema when position deletes are present so ComputeAliveRows can apply them. Pass false when the caller owns position filtering externally (e.g. a vectorised reader that applies the position delete index directly to Arrow column buffers). Note that when need_row_pos_col is false, HasPositionDeletes() may return true but ComputeAliveRows will not apply position deletes because _pos is absent from RequiredSchema. The caller is responsible for applying them.
Optional counter incremented for each deleted row.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string file_path, std::span< const std::shared_ptr< DataFile > > delete_files, std::shared_ptr< TableMetadata > table_metadata, std::shared_ptr< Schema > requested_schema, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io, bool need_row_pos_col=true, std::shared_ptr< DeleteCounter > counter=nullptr)
memberdef.name: Make

briefdescription.para: Create a DeleteFilter using table metadata for schema-aware field lookup.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string file_path, std::span< const std::shared_ptr< DataFile > > delete_files, std::shared_ptr< Schema > table_schema, std::shared_ptr< Schema > requested_schema, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io, std::span< const std::shared_ptr< Schema > > schemas, bool need_row_pos_col=true, std::shared_ptr< DeleteCounter > counter=nullptr)
memberdef.name: Make

briefdescription.para: Create a DeleteFilter with table schemas for dropped equality fields.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string file_path, std::span< const std::shared_ptr< DataFile > > delete_files, std::shared_ptr< Schema > requested_schema, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io, FieldLookup field_lookup, bool need_row_pos_col=true, std::shared_ptr< DeleteCounter > counter=nullptr)
memberdef.name: Make

briefdescription.para: Create a DeleteFilter with a custom field lookup.
Schema required from the underlying data file reader.
The original schema requested by the caller, before delete columns were added.
Increment the delete counter by the given count.

detaileddescription.para: Allows callers to record deletes that occur outside ComputeAliveRows (e.g. when applying deletes in a vectorised path).

briefdescription.para: Expose the loaded position delete index for external use.

detaileddescription.para: Triggers lazy loading of position delete files on first call. Returns nullptr when there are no position deletes. Returns an error if loading fails.
The returned pointer is valid only for the lifetime of this DeleteFilter.

memberdef.definition: Result< std::function< Result< bool >(const StructLike &)> > iceberg::DeleteFilter::EqDeletedRowFilter
memberdef.name: EqDeletedRowFilter

briefdescription.para: Returns a predicate that is true for rows NOT matched by any equality delete.

detaileddescription.para: The returned function is valid for the lifetime of this DeleteFilter and is cached after the first call. When there are no equality deletes, returns a predicate that always returns true (every row is alive).

simplesect.para: The returned predicate is NOT thread-safe: it mutates internal projection state on each call. Do not invoke it concurrently from multiple threads.

briefdescription.para: Returns a predicate that is true for rows matched by any equality delete.

detaileddescription.para: Inverse of EqDeletedRowFilter(). When there are no equality deletes, returns a predicate that always returns false (no row is deleted).

briefdescription.para: Compute alive rows relative to the supplied Arrow C Data batch.

detaileddescription.para: Returns the indices (zero-based, relative to the batch) of rows not matched by any delete. Deleted-row counts are forwarded to the DeleteCounter supplied at construction.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string file_path, std::shared_ptr< Schema > requested_schema, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io, FieldLookup field_lookup, bool need_row_pos_col, std::shared_ptr< DeleteCounter > counter)
memberdef.name: DeleteFilter

briefdescription.para: Concrete batch-oriented delete filter for merge-on-read data batches.
